name: nextcloud/intros
description: Nextcloud Intros - Onboarding tour for Files

scripts.build: rm -rf dist-tmp && vite build --mode production && cp dist-tmp/js/*.mjs js/ && cp node_modules/shepherd.js/dist/css/shepherd.css css/intros.css && rm -rf dist-tmp
scripts.dev: rm -rf dist-tmp && vite build --mode development && cp dist-tmp/js/*.mjs js/ && cp node_modules/shepherd.js/dist/css/shepherd.css css/intros.css && rm -rf dist-tmp
